app.name: bizbeecms
app.description: Cloudflare-native multi-site B2B whitelabel CMS — per-Site CMS instance

home.title: bizbeecms · CMS
home.intro: A whitelabel CMS instance. The ProjectManager deploys one of these per Site to Cloudflare. For now this is the default Next.js install.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Describe what you want and the assistant builds it — components, pages, translations.
chat.empty: Ask the assistant to create a component or compose a page.

widget.title: AI Assistant
widget.subtitle: Build with chat — on any page.
widget.creditTitle: Remaining credit on the in-use OpenRouter key
widget.overrideTitle: A saved system-prompt version is active for your session only.

prompts.title: System prompt versions
prompts.help: Save and switch full system-prompt versions for your session only. End users keep the default.
prompts.active: A saved version is active for this session.
prompts.label: Version label

enterMode.aria: Toggle Enter key behaviour: send message or insert newline

attach.textOnly: This model is text-only — it can't read attachments.
attach.readDisk: Attach a file to read (from disk)
attach.readGallery: Attach a file to read (from gallery)
attach.insertGalleryHint: Adds the file's URL for the assistant to use on the page

gallery.readTitle: Choose files for the assistant to read
gallery.empty: No media yet. Upload images in the Media library first.
gallery.selectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing selected} one {# selected} other {# selected}}
gallery.searchPlaceholder: Search media by description or tag…
gallery.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This removes it from the library permanently.

contentLocales.title: Content languages
contentLocales.subtitle: The user-facing languages this site publishes content in (separate from the admin UI language).
contentLocales.addPlaceholder: Language code, e.g. fi or pt-br
contentLocales.invalidCode: Enter a valid language code (2–3 letters, optional region).
contentLocales.duplicate: That language is already in the list.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Override the published site's color tokens without a rebuild. Leave a field empty to use the default. Accepts hex (#1a2b3c) or oklch()/rgb()/hsl() values.
theme.overrideCount: {count, plural, =0 {No overrides — using defaults} one {# override} other {# overrides}}
theme.previewBody: Sample text in a card on a raised surface.

media.title: Media library
media.subtitle: Upload images to this site and reference them in components by their URL.
media.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF or SVG, up to {max}MB.
media.empty: No media yet. Upload an image to get started.

brand.title: Brand & AI persona
brand.subtitle: Describe this Site's identity once. The AI assistant uses it to make every generated component and page match your brand.

placeholder.design: e.g. Minimal, generous whitespace, rounded cards
placeholder.aiPersona: e.g. Always suggest accessible contrast; prefer short sections

hint.brandName: The name of your brand or Site.
hint.tagline: A one-line summary of what this Site is about.
hint.voice: How copy should sound — tone and personality.
hint.design: The visual style the AI should aim for.
hint.aiPersona: Extra behavioral guidance for the AI builder.

components.title: Components
components.subtitle: Export a component as a portable bundle, or import one into this site.
components.empty: No components yet. Create one in the AI chat, then export it here.
components.importHint: Paste a component bundle JSON, or upload a .json file. Imported components are validated before saving.
components.importEmpty: Paste a bundle or choose a file first.
components.kitsHint: Install a curated set of premade components in one click. The blog kit adds a post header, body, author card and post list; the landing kit adds a hero, feature grid, CTA band, testimonial and footer; the docs kit adds a header, callout, code block, step list and API parameter; the portfolio kit adds a hero, project card, skill list, work timeline and contact callout; the pricing kit adds a section header, plan tier, feature row, product card and FAQ item.
components.assetDepsHint: This component references the media assets below. Make sure they exist on this site (upload them, or they will appear broken).
components.componentDepsHint: This component renders the components below, which are not installed on this site. Import them first, or they will render as hidden placeholders.
components.rebindHint: For each asset this bundle references, keep it as-is, point it at one of this site's media files, or drop it. Then re-import to apply.
components.exportKitPickTag: Pick a tag to export as a kit
components.previewMissingDeps: Missing component deps this site needs: {deps}
components.previewAssets: References {count} asset(s) — upload them or rebind after install.
components.previewSkipped: {count} component(s) failed validation and will be skipped.

adminAuth.forbiddenBody: You're signed in, but your account doesn't have access to manage this site. Ask a site administrator to grant you access.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage this site.
login.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.
login.googleDenied: That Google account isn't allowed to sign in here. Ask a site administrator for an invitation.
login.googleInvitePending: You have a pending invitation — open the invite link in your email to finish setting up your account.
login.errorTooMany: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

adminNav.indexSubtitle: Manage this site's content, components and configuration.

desc.components: Export components as portable bundles, import them, or install starter kits.
desc.media: Upload images to this site and reference them in components by URL.
desc.settings: Content languages, theme color overrides, and brand & AI persona.
desc.pageBuilder: Compose pages visually from blocks and components.
desc.collections: Define typed data collections, fill them with content, and query them.

pageBuilder.title: Page Builder

bind.title: Bind to collection
bind.help: Fill this block's props from the first matching collection item.
bind.noCollections: No collections yet — create one in Collections.
bind.noProps: This component declares no props to bind.

list.title: List
list.help: Repeat a component once per matching collection item.

pageBuilder.componentsEmpty: No components yet — import a kit or component.
pageBuilder.emptyCanvas: Select a page from the top bar to start editing.
pageBuilder.layersEmpty: No blocks yet — add a Section from the Components rail.

create.invalidSlug: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits or hyphens.

pageBuilder.previewEmpty: The page preview appears here once a page is selected.
pageBuilder.blockEmpty: Select a block in the Layers panel to edit its properties.
pageBuilder.pageEmpty: Page settings appear here once a page is selected.

page.deleteConfirm: Delete this page? This can't be undone.

versions.label: Version history
versions.empty: No published versions yet. Publish to create the first.
versions.restoreConfirm: Create an editable draft from this version? Your current draft will be replaced.

pageBuilder.seoEmpty: SEO settings appear here once a page is selected.
pageBuilder.addSectionFirst: Add a Section first, then drop components into it.
pageBuilder.seoMetaImageEmpty: No image set for this language.
pageBuilder.seoMetaImageGalleryEmpty: No images in the media library yet.

colVisibility.label: Visibility
colVisibility.hint: Hide this column on the selected screen sizes.

deleteColumn.confirm: Delete this column and its components?

deleteNode.confirmSection: Delete this section and everything in it?

pageBuilder.componentNoProps: This component has no configurable properties.
pageBuilder.columnAlignHint: Override this column's alignment (defaults to the Section).

translate.empty: Nothing to translate in the source language.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Define typed data collections, manage their fields, and edit their content.
collections.offline: Connect a live database to manage this collection.
collections.empty: No collections yet. Create your first one.
collections.name: Name
collections.namePlaceholder: e.g. Blog posts or Team members
collections.confirmDelete: Delete collection “{name}” and all its data? This cannot be undone.
collections.confirmDeleteItem: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
collections.confirmDropField: Drop field “{name}” and all its data? The table is rebuilt; this cannot be undone.
collections.sqlConsoleHint: Run a read-only SELECT over your collection tables. Only SELECT on content_* tables is allowed.
collections.sqlPlaceholder: SELECT * FROM content_blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' LIMIT 50

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Bearer keys for the remote MCP server. Each key gives full programmatic access to this site — share it only with trusted tools.
apiKeys.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage API keys. Ask an Admin.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke the key “{label}”? Any tool using it will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.mintedWarning: This is the only time the key is shown. Copy it and store it somewhere safe — you can't see it again.
apiKeys.connectIntro: Add this site to Claude Code as a remote MCP server. Replace bzb_YOUR_KEY with a key you created above — all the CMS assistant tools then appear in Claude Code.
apiKeys.connectJsonLabel: Or add it to your MCP config (.mcp.json):
apiKeys.connectHint: One key = one site. This URL manages only this site. Revoke a key above to cut off access immediately.

inviteEmail.subject: You're invited to BizbeeCMS
inviteEmail.subjectWithDomain: {domain}: You are invited to use BizBeeCMS

resetEmail.subject: Reset your BizbeeCMS password

acceptInvite.title: Accept your invitation
acceptInvite.subtitle: Set a password for {email} to finish creating your account.
acceptInvite.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
acceptInvite.errorExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask for a new one.
acceptInvite.errorAccepted: This invitation has already been used.
acceptInvite.errorEmailTaken: An account already exists for this email.
acceptInvite.errorGeneric: Couldn't accept the invitation. Try again.
acceptInvite.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can access this site's CMS. Invite teammates, set their role, or remove access.
users.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage users. Ask an Admin or Manager.
users.inviteSent: Invite sent. They'll get an email with an accept link.
users.inviteCreatedNoEmail: Invite created. Email isn't configured yet — share the accept link from the server logs.
users.removeConfirm: Remove {email}? They'll lose access to this site's CMS immediately.
users.revokeConfirm: Revoke the invite for {email}? Their accept link will stop working.

err.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
err.notAllowed: You're not allowed to invite users.
err.emailTaken: That person already has an account.
err.alreadyInvited: That person already has a pending invite.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Couldn't send the reset link. Try again.
forgotPassword.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.
forgotPassword.errorTooMany: Too many reset requests for this email. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
resetPassword.errorTokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Couldn't reset your password. Try again.
resetPassword.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.

googleClient.title: Google sign-in
googleClient.subtitle: Let your team sign in with your organization's Google account.
googleClient.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage Google sign-in.
googleClient.help: Register your own Google OAuth 2.0 client and paste its credentials here. Use "<APP_ORIGIN>/api/auth/google/callback" as the authorized redirect URI. The secret is stored encrypted and never shown again.
googleClient.clientSecretSetPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current secret
googleClient.clearConfirm: Remove the stored Google client credentials? Google sign-in will be disabled until you add them again.

openrouterKey.title: OpenRouter key
openrouterKey.subtitle: Use your own OpenRouter key for this site’s AI assistant.
openrouterKey.forbidden: You don’t have permission to manage the OpenRouter key.
openrouterKey.help: Paste your own OpenRouter API key (starts with "sk-or-"). It’s stored encrypted and preferred over the built-in key. Leave it empty to use the deployment’s key.
openrouterKey.keySetPlaceholder: A key is stored — paste a new one to replace it
openrouterKey.clearConfirm: Remove the stored OpenRouter key? The AI assistant will use the deployment’s key instead.

mediaSettings.title: Media
mediaSettings.subtitle: Choose the AI model that describes uploaded images so they’re searchable.
mediaSettings.forbidden: You don’t have permission to manage media settings.

imageModel.label: Image description model
imageModel.hint: A vision model reads each uploaded image and writes a short description used for media search.

develop.title: Develop components
develop.subtitle: Select a component to preview it with its placeholder data, or delete unwanted ones.
develop.confirmDelete: Delete component "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
develop.noPlaceholderData: This component has no placeholder data, so the preview may be empty. Ask the assistant to add propsSchema defaults.
develop.selectPrompt: Select a component to preview it.
develop.propsHint: Edit the placeholder values the preview binds. Saved as the component's defaults.

capture.caption: Here is "{name}" rendered at desktop, tablet, and mobile widths. Review how it looks at each size and refine the component so it works well across all of them.
